nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Cron every 5 min. The brain of Phase 4. (1) Sweeps sentinel_ip_blocklist for expired entries. (2) Loads open alerts (last 30 min) + active playbooks + recent sentinel_actions (last 24h, for cooldown checks). (3) For each (alert, playbook) match, checks severity gate + cooldown. (4) Auto-actions: execute directly + write sentinel_actions row. Approval-required: write pending sentinel_actions row with human_approved=false. (5) Also evaluates auto_resume_when_healthy by reading paused breakers + recent sentinel_workflow_health rows.
